_comment: Historical worst-case sensor snapshot — modeled on AQI patterns observed in NYC during the June 7 2023 Canadian wildfire smoke event (citywide AQI 400+) and the Aug 2023 heat dome (AQI 130-180 in outer-borough industrial corridors). We pick a moderated worst-case: Bronx hot spots in the unhealthy band (160-220), Manhattan moderate-to-sensitive (110-150), outer boroughs sensitive (100-130). Hotter than the default --demo-snapshot, still inside a band where the time-scrubber's 4pm clearance reads as plausible.
based_on: NYC AQI patterns: June 7 2023 wildfire smoke + Aug 2023 heat dome
